arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling decision made as £42m man returns: Arsenal predicted XI v Aston Villa
arts.sum: Arsenal will hope to make it two wins in a row this week when they host Aston Villa in Saturday’s Premier League encounter at the...

arts.ttl: Arsenal Could Sign ‘Exceptional’ Brazil Striker After Sesko Blow
arts.sum: Ben Jacobs has suggested an unfamiliar name is on Arsenal's radar amid injury issues in attack.
Match of the Day pundits Micah Richards and Alan Shearer discuss how Arsenal beat a "passive" Tottenham Hotspur 2-1 in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Nwaneri returns and Sterling dropped - Dream Arsenal line-up to face Aston Villa
arts.sum: Determined to change that record, Arsenal have recovered their form following two cup defeats last week and were dominant while still lacking clinical finishing in the box, as they won the North London Derby on Wednesday night. Dream Arsenal XI vs Aston Villa – Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Havertz, Trossard

arts.ttl: Odegaard role, Ronaldo inspiration - Who is Arsenal target Sverre Nypan
arts.sum: In the latest report from The Telegraph, it is understood that Arsenal and Manchester City are currently leading the way in pursuit of Sverre Nypan, an 18-year-old central midfielder plying his trade at Rosenborg. Potentially working against Arsenal in their pursuit of Nypan is his support for rivals Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Six Arsenal players confirmed for permanent exits and seven on edge as Mikel Arteta clears decks
arts.sum: Whether it is this month or in the summer transfer window, a number of players are going to be leaving the club as Mikel Arteta looks to change his plans and overhaul his playing squad. But while they may only sign one or two players this month - if any at all - the summer is going to be a bigger priority for Arteta and an incoming sporting director to replace Edu.

arts.ttl: Arsenal interested in Marseille’s Elye Wahi
arts.sum: According to a report by La Provence, Premier League side Arsenal are interested in Olympique de Marseille forward Elye Wahi (22). The Gunners have reportedly added Wahi’s name to a list…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'going all out' to HIJACK new target
arts.sum: Aston Villa are 'going all out' for Levante star Andres Garcia, according to Spanish media. According to various Spanish sources, including MARCA, Cope and Relevo, Aston Villa are pushing for the signing of Levante full-back Andres Garcia.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to seal second January transfer after deal agreed for defender
arts.sum: Garcia, though, has reportedly been identified as a defender with a big future who could be recruited this month. Aston Villa are reportedly set to sign Levante right-back Andres Garcia for a fee of around £6m.

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about Donyell Malen, Diego Carlos transfer, injuries and Arsenal
arts.sum: “We are preparing for the match - we are very motivated and we’re going to try to play by improving things we did in Everton and improving things we did away in the last matches against top teams in the Premier League. Villa have won their last three games in all competitions and are targeting successive away league wins against Arsenal after beating the title-chasing Gunners 2-0 in the capital last season.
